creator: rnejdl@ringofsaturn.com
text:
On 24.08.2011 20:50, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of deskutils/calibre,
>
> Please note that PR ports/160158 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/160158

My apologies for not putting in the correct from address again.  This 
request was from me so please approve myself. :)

Rusty
